message:
Command `# Good! Let me also check all other sequences that might have the same issue
# Test UART, I2C, SPI, Timer, PWM, CRC, AES, WWDT, RTC quickly
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ in UART I2C SPI TIMER PWM CRC AES WWDT RTC; do
  iverilog -g2005-sv \
    -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
    -DTEST_SEQ_${SEQ} \
    -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
    -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
    -o /tmp/test_${SEQ,,}.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "${SEQ}: compile errors={}"
done
echo "compile done"` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Good! Let me also check all other sequences that might have the same issue
# Test UART, I2C, SPI, Timer, PWM, CRC, AES, WWDT, RTC quickly
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ in UART I2C SPI TIMER PWM CRC AES WWDT RTC; do
  iverilog -g2005-sv \
    -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
    -DTEST_SEQ_${SEQ} \
    -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
    -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
    -o /tmp/test_${SEQ,,}.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "${SEQ}: compile errors={}"
done
echo "compile done"", "timeout": 120}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
UART: compile errors=0
I2C: compile errors=0
SPI: compile errors=0
TIMER: compile errors=0
PWM: compile errors=0
CRC: compile errors=0
AES: compile errors=0
WWDT: compile errors=0
RTC: compile errors=0
compile done

extras.command:
# Good! Let me also check all other sequences that might have the same issue
# Test UART, I2C, SPI, Timer, PWM, CRC, AES, WWDT, RTC quickly
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ in UART I2C SPI TIMER PWM CRC AES WWDT RTC; do
  iverilog -g2005-sv \
    -I.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb \
    -DTEST_SEQ_${SEQ} \
    -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
    -fmspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f \
    -o /tmp/test_${SEQ,,}.vvp 2>&1 | grep -c "error" | xargs -I{} echo "${SEQ}: compile errors={}"
done
echo "compile done"
